entity.label: Nodab
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: Noble, probably a tribe descended from one of the sons of Ishmael, with whom the trans-Jordanic tribes made war (1 Chr. 5:19).

nodes.label: Nodab
nodes.description: Noble, probably a tribe descended from one of the sons of Ishmael, with whom the trans-Jordanic tribes made war (1 Chr. 5:19).

verses.text: And they made war with the Hagarites, with Jetur, and Nephish, and Nodab.
